stdout:
**Findings**

No blocking findings.

**Acceptance Criteria**

The reserved `invariant` routing has been removed from the engine path. `InvariantMustBeProjectRegistryFirst`, `UnknownRegistrySource`, `invariant_raw_items`, and the `kind.name() == INVARIANT_KIND_NAME` / `name == INVARIANT_KIND_NAME` branches are absent from `crates/jit/src` and tests. `project_items()` now routes registry-first project kinds only through `kind.toml_source()` and `load_toml_scope_items()` at [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:206).

Existing invariant indexing is descriptor-backed: `ItemKind::invariant_default()` declares the `.jit/invariants.toml` TOML descriptor at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:735), and command tests seed/read it via `IssueStore::read_repo_file` at [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:769).

**Prior Review Feedback**

The previous blocking docs are addressed. `toml_source()` now says the built-in invariant returns `Some(descriptor)` at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:818). The config docs no longer call `invariant` reserved at [crates/jit/src/config.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/config.rs:268). The stale command test-helper wording was also replaced at [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:487) and [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:669).

**Architecture And Separation**

No boundary violation found. Commands still orchestrate domain and storage; registry TOML is read through `IssueStore::read_repo_file` at [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:213). The TOML projection remains pure in `load_toml_scope_items()` at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1320).

**Functional Paradigm**

No blocking regression. The changed domain resolution uses expression-style matching for source presence at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:545). The command layer keeps a pragmatic loop around storage reads, which is acceptable at the I/O boundary.

**Correctness And Invariants**

The important behavior is covered: registry-first project kinds without TOML descriptors now fail with `MissingProjectSource` at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:549), and invariant entries continue to resolve as `@/<id>` through the generic path. Gate semantics, labels, assignees, event logging, atomic writes, and PID safety are not materially changed by this patch.

**Safety**

No unsafe code was introduced in the reviewed changes.

**Testing**

I did not run cargo tests because the issue has a passed `cargo-ci` gate in the provided context. The prior failed `code-review` gate is addressed as noted above. New/updated coverage includes unit command tests for descriptor-backed invariant resolution at [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:895), domain tests for removing reserved-name behavior at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1877), and real CLI coverage at [crates/jit/tests/item_cli_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/tests/item_cli_tests.rs:495).

**Error Handling**

No new `unwrap()` / `expect()` was found in changed non-test library code. Context is preserved around TOML source reads and projections at [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:216) and [crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:225).

**CLI Contract**

No new CLI command was added. Existing affected item commands retain `--json`; the integration coverage exercises `jit item list --kind invariant --json` at [crates/jit/tests/item_cli_tests.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/tests/item_cli_tests.rs:520).

**Documentation**

The public API docs changed with the behavior and include examples for the descriptor-backed invariant default at [crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-f6318259/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:712). No stale reserved-name API docs remain in the reviewed paths.

**Jit Issue Management**

The dependency `5ff3a6ae` is marked `done` in the issue context. I ran `./scripts/jit-validate.sh`; it passed with “Repository validation passed.”

VERDICT: PASS
---
Gate result: PASSED
